intro: Caiophora pterosperma, also known as the "Peruvian featherflower," is a type of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Caiophora pterosperma include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
